title: Hexthingy
description: Hexcasting addon that adds useful spells and patterns.
body:
# An addon for Hexcasting with new features. ### Currently have:
**  Great spells
**     Allay Creation (Makes Allay from Vex)
    Smite (Deals damage)
**  Spells
**     Clean Effects
**  Patterns
**     Pasteur's Purification (Returns health of entity)
## Feel free to ask anything you'd like to see on [Github](https://github.com/Uwutaku/Hexthingy/issues).
